description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a highly distorted and elongated body, featuring exaggerated limbs and a twisted torso. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted athletic outfit with a jacket and pants, both adorned with bold, linear accents. The shoes are low-profile and casual, suitable for walking or running. The head is detailed with facial features and long hair styled in a high ponytail, though the proportions are stretched unnaturally. The overall form is fragmented, with limbs and body parts extending in sharp, angular directions, creating a surreal and abstract appearance. The surface finish is smooth, with visible seams and color transitions between the clothing and skin.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure in athletic wear, with elongated limbs and a twisted, abstract posture. The figure features a detailed head with a high ponytail and casual shoes.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face, upper torso, and the dramatic twisting of the body, with limbs extending outward in sharp angles.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the extreme elongation of the arms and legs, with the head and torso appearing compressed and stretched horizontally.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the head and the ponytail, with the limbs and body appearing fragmented and extending away from the central axis.
description_view_3: This view shows the figure from another side, focusing on the lower body and the unusual, angular extension of the legs and arms.
attribute_hairstyle: long hair in a high ponytail
